item.title: Perplexity AI App [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Perplexity AI App [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: inulute
item.itunes:summary:
Perplexity AI App
(Internet Apps)
The Perplexity AI Desktop App is an unofficial application developed by inulute that brings the power of AI language processing to your desktop, powered by Electron. This application is designed to enhance your experience with Perplexity AI

item.title: Data Recovery for Memory Card [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery for Memory Card [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery for Memory Card
(Utilities)
File recovery software restores deleted pictures from digital memory cards and is easy to operate without any technical help. www.datarecoverybook.com company website facilitates Data Recovery for Memory Card utility which regains lost images that missing due to virus infected memory cards.
[read more]

item.title: USB Drive Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Digital photo reviving application is provided by site www.datarecoverybook.com for retrieving corrupted pictures and other valuable screenshots from thumb drive. USB Drive Data Recovery Software uses advanced technology for getting back spyware affected your favorite games from jump drive.Affordable file recouping tool is easy to use for reviving accidently deleted audios songs saved in various formats like mp3, wav etc from flash storage device. USB Drive Data Recovery Software is capable to restore logically affected wallpapers, projects and presentation slides from pen drive. Download image restoration tool from site www.datarecoverybook.com that recovers formatted office documents from key chain storage device.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Most powerful image restoration application has ability to recover entire lost, corrupted image files from major digital storage devices of any capacity. Reliable Digital Camera Data Recovery software allows user to retrieve virus infected photos from major brands of camera such as Point and Shoot camera, Digital Video camera, Novelty camera, Professional camera of different sizes and pixels and many more within shortest time duration.

(Utilities)

Most powerful image restoration application retrieves lost media files after being deleted from recycle bin folder without requiring professional guidance.

Effective Digital Picture Data Recovery application download link is available at www.datarecoverybook.com to recover and restore multiple file format supported images without losing picture quality. Most powerful image restoration application retrieves lost media files after being deleted from recycle bin folder without requiring professional guidance.

item.title: hashSum [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: hashSum [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
hashSum
(Utilities)
Please visit https://gitlab.com/posktomten/hashsum/-/wikis/home
A program for calculating hash sums.
- Text to speech
- Choose whether you want to calculate the hash sums, or compare two files
- You can choose the calculation algorithm. (MD4, MD5, SHA1, SHA224, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512, SHA3_224, SHA3_256, SHA3_384, SHA3_512, KECCAK_224, KECCAK_256, KECCAK_384 and KECCAK_512)
- You can create lists of checksums that are stored as a text file.
- You can recursively create lists of hash sum files.
- Ability to search recursively for file duplicates.
- You can compare against a selected hash sum.
- You can check which files have changed, who's new and what has been lost since the last time you checked.
- You can choose the operating system's "Open" and "Save" dialogues, or the program's own lists of checksums can be auto saved.
- You can calculate and compare hashsummor for text strings.
- You can choose a default filename to save the checksum lists.
- Swedish, Greek and English menus.
- The program can check for updates.
- The program supports "Drag and Drop".
- Create Debian md5sums
- Create Debian md5sums (auto)
[read more]
item.description:
hashSum
(Utilities)
Please visit https://gitlab.com/posktomten/hashsum/-/wikis/home
A program for calculating hash sums.
- Text to speech
- Choose whether you want to calculate the hash sums, or compare two files
- You can choose the calculation algorithm. (MD4, MD5, SHA1, SHA224, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512, SHA3_224, SHA3_256, SHA3_384, SHA3_512, KECCAK_224, KECCAK_256, KECCAK_384 and KECCAK_512)
- You can create lists of checksums that are stored as a text file.
- You can recursively create lists of hash sum files.
- Ability to search recursively for file duplicates.
- You can compare against a selected hash sum.
- You can check which files have changed, who's new and what has been lost since the last time you checked.
- You can choose the operating system's "Open" and "Save" dialogues, or the program's own lists of checksums can be auto saved.
- You can calculate and compare hashsummor for text strings.
- You can choose a default filename to save the checksum lists.
- Swedish, Greek and English menus.
- The program can check for updates.
- The program supports "Drag and Drop".
- Create Debian md5sums
- Create Debian md5sums (auto)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
hashSum
(Utilities)
Please visit https://gitlab.com/posktomten/hashsum/-/wikis/home
A program for calculating hash sums.
- Text to speech
- Choose whether you want to calculate the hash sums, or compare two files
- You can choose the calculation algorithm. (MD4, MD5, SHA1, SHA224, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512, SHA3_224, SHA3_256, SHA3_384, SHA3_512, KECCAK_224, KECCAK_256, KECCAK_384 and KECCAK_512)
- You can create lists of checksums that are stored as a text file.
- You can recursively create lists of hash sum files.
- Ability to search recursively for file duplicates.
- You can compare against a selected hash sum.
- You can check which files have changed, who's new and what has been lost since the last time you checked.
- You can choose the operating system's "Open" and "Save" dialogues, or the program's own lists of checksums can be auto saved.
- You can calculate and compare hashsummor for text strings.
- You can choose a default filename to save the checksum lists.
- Swedish, Greek and English menus.
- The program can check for updates.
- The program supports "Drag and Drop".
- Create Debian md5sums
- Create Debian md5sums (auto)
[read more]

item.title: libselectfont [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: libselectfont [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
libselectfont
(Developers Apps)
Qt5 and Qt6 library to select font. An alternative to QFontDialog
For 32-bit and for 64-bit.
[read more]

Qt5 and Qt6 library to select font. An alternative to QFontDialog
For 32-bit and for 64-bit.

item.title: Qt Linguist [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Qt Linguist [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
Qt Linguist
(Developers Apps)
This is not an official Qt company release, just alternative download.
Qt Linguist is a tool for adding translations to Qt applications.
Copyright (C) 2018 - 2024 The Qt Company Ltd.

The purpose of this project is to offer the opportunity to translate programs created in the Qt development environment without having to download and install the entire Qt IDE.

[read more]
item.description:

(Developers Apps)
This is not an official Qt company release, just alternative download.
Qt Linguist is a tool for adding translations to Qt applications.
Copyright (C) 2018 - 2024 The Qt Company Ltd.

The purpose of this project is to offer the opportunity to translate programs created in the Qt development environment without having to download and install the entire Qt IDE.

[read more]

Qt Linguist
(Developers Apps)
This is not an official Qt company release, just alternative download.
Qt Linguist is a tool for adding translations to Qt applications.
Copyright (C) 2018 - 2024 The Qt Company Ltd.

The purpose of this project is to offer the opportunity to translate programs created in the Qt development environment without having to download and install the entire Qt IDE.
